meaning: n.[化]氚(氢的放射性同位素)
examples: A tritium atom has two extra neutrons.
Two types, or isotopes, of hydrogen are used - deuterium and tritium.
The best fuels for fusion are two types, or isotopes, of hydrogen - deuterium and tritium.
The exit signs are Isolite Model 2040-95S-B-15-WS, and each contain 9.5 Curies of tritium.
Since tritium is almost always found as water, it goes directly into soft tissues and organs.
